arts.ttl: Wigan Athletic star assesses Rotherham United win - and bemoans Carlisle United fate
arts.sum: Jon Mellish wants Wigan Athletic to use their Easter resurrection as the catalyst to ensure they never find themselves in this situation again.

arts.ttl: Player ratings - Wigan Athletic v Rotherham United - ‘...Arguably his best game for Latics, leaves literally everything out there...’
arts.sum: Paul Kendrick runs the rule over the Wigan Athletic side that won 1-0 against Rotherham United and delivers his report card.

arts.ttl: Wigan Athletic boss makes surprising relegation admission after Rotherham United victory
arts.sum: Ryan Lowe watched Wigan Athletic secure their League One status for next season with victory over Rotherham United - then insisted he never thought it was 'in too much doubt'.

arts.ttl: James Carragher nets Wigan winner against Rotherham to secure survival
arts.sum: Mallik Wilks missed a great chance to equalise for the Millers.

arts.ttl: James Carragher nods Wigan Athletic to victory over Rotherham United - and safety!
arts.sum: James Carragher’s 36th-minute header gave Wigan Athletic a second Easter victory – and mathematically secured their League One safety – as Rotherham United were comfortably beaten at the Brick.

arts.ttl: Preview: Wigan Athletic vs. Rotherham United - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Monday's League One clash between Wigan Athletic and Rotherham United, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.
